free_text: Institute, CA + Centenary College of Louisiana
Polarized proton beam produced in an atomic beam
system: a vertically focusing entrance quadrupole
magnet and two separately adjustable dipole magnets
The targets were made from a pressed powder of the
separated 10B isotope enriched to better than 99%
purity. The main contaminants were 11B and 12C.
Data received from E. J. Stephenson
